case_number: Constitutional Petition is dismissed for non-prosecution

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D- 956 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with Signature of Judge For non-prosecution 16-10-2025 None present for the Petitioner nor any intimation is received. Though on 15-05-2025, Counsel for the Petitioner was present and sought time for compliance, as such one week time was granted for compliance; however, he has not yet complied with the office objection. The instant Constitutional Petition is pending since, 2023 without any useful progress. The deliberate absence on the part of the Petitioner and his Counsel prima facie suggests that either the purpose of filing instant Petition has been served or they have lost interest in pursuing the same. Accordingly, the instant Constitutional Petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge ARBROHI
